intents.response: Hello! Welcome to our support service. How can I assist you today?
I'm doing great! Thanks for asking. How can I help you today?
Our office is open from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM, Monday to Friday.
You can contact us at support@example.com or call +1-234-567-8900.
Our headquarters are located at 123 Main Street, New York, USA.
Please provide your order ID, and I'll help you track your order.
I can help with that. Please provide your order number for cancellation assistance.
We're sorry you're not satisfied. Please share your order ID, and we'll guide you through the refund process.
You can reset your password by clicking the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page.
Sorry for the inconvenience. Please ensure your credentials are correct or use the password reset option.
Please provide your transaction ID and payment method so we can investigate the issue.
Please provide the product name or ID, and I'll check its availability.
Shipping charges depend on your location and order value. Please provide your delivery address.
We're sorry to hear that. Please describe the issue, and we'll do our best to resolve it quickly.
You're welcome! Feel free to reach out if you need any further assistance.
Thank you for contacting us. Have a great day!
I'm here to help. Please tell me what issue you're facing.
I can connect you with a support representative. Please wait a moment.
I can answer questions about orders, payments, refunds, accounts, shipping, and more.
I'm sorry, I didn't understand that. Could you please rephrase your question?
